# T-ONE (Boutique POS)

React + Node/Express + MySQL POS dashboard with an optional Android (Capacitor) build.

## Quick Start (New Shop / Fresh Install)

```powershell
cd C:\boutique-pos
npm run fresh:install
npm run dev
```

`fresh:install` will:
- install `backend/` + `pos-frontend/` dependencies
- run DB migrations
- create the first admin account (if missing)
- set `ALLOW_BOOTSTRAP=false` in `backend/.env` once an admin exists

## Production Notes

- Use a strong `JWT_SECRET` in `backend/.env`.
- Set `RATE_LIMIT_STORE=redis` + `REDIS_URL=...` in `backend/.env` for Redis-backed auth rate limiting.
- See `backend/db/MIGRATIONS.md` for migrations.
